summary: Complete testing of KiteAlgo memory optimization and ML integration features. All 19 backend API tests passed. Frontend pages verified - Dashboard, Backtest Lab with ML toggle, Optimizer with ML toggle and combination limit. All critical features working correctly.

issues: Console warning about chart width/height being -1, but charts still render correctly

passed_tests: POST /api/backtest/run with trendshift and use_ml_filter=true - works correctly
POST /api/backtest/run with trendshift and use_ml_filter=false - works correctly
GET /api/backtest/results - returns list of backtest results
POST /api/optimizer/run with small grid under 2000 combinations - completes successfully
POST /api/optimizer/run rejects > 2000 combinations with proper error message
POST /api/optimizer/run with trendshift and ML filter in fixed_params - works correctly
GET /api/optimizer/results - returns list of optimizer results
POST /api/walkforward/run with sma_crossover - returns walk-forward results
GET /api/walkforward/results - returns list of walk-forward results
GET /api/jobs - returns list of analysis jobs
GET /api/jobs?kind=backtest - filters by backtest kind
GET /api/jobs?kind=optimizer - filters by optimizer kind
GET /api/chart/candles - returns candles with indicators
GET /api/chart/candles with include_indicators=true - returns full indicator data
GET /api/settings - returns settings
GET /api/strategies - includes trendshift strategy
GET /api/journal - returns trade journal data
GET /api/ml/models - returns list of ML models
GET /api/dashboard/summary - returns dashboard data
Frontend Dashboard loads at / - metrics, charts, signals table visible
Frontend Backtest Lab page loads - ML toggle visible for TrendShift
Frontend Optimizer page loads - ML toggle visible for TrendShift with preset selector
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing backtests from previous test runs
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new memory optimization features tested and working: 1) Backtest with use_ml_filter parameter (true/false) for TrendShift strategy works correctly. 2) Optimizer correctly rejects combinations > 2000 with proper error message. 3) Walk-forward optimization with lightweight mode works. 4) Job queue system processes backtest and optimizer jobs correctly. 5) Frontend BacktestLab and Optimizer pages show ML toggle checkbox when TrendShift strategy is selected.

mocked_apis.paper_trading: Paper broker simulation for trade execution (by design)
mocked_apis.zerodha_auth: Real Zerodha credentials not configured - handled gracefully
mocked_apis.telegram_alerts: Real Telegram credentials not configured - safely skipped

memory_optimization.lightweight_mode: BacktestEngine uses lightweight=True in optimizer/walk-forward to skip storing equity_curve and trades
memory_optimization.gc_collect: gc.collect() runs every 25 iterations in optimizer and walk-forward loops
memory_optimization.combination_cap: Optimizer hard caps at 2000 combinations with proper 400 error

ml_integration.use_ml_filter_param: Backtest accepts use_ml_filter parameter in parameters field
ml_integration.trendshift_default: use_ml_filter defaults to true in TrendShift strategy
ml_integration.ui_toggle_backtest: ML Regime Filter checkbox visible in BacktestLab when TrendShift selected
ml_integration.ui_toggle_optimizer: ML Regime Filter checkbox visible in Optimizer when TrendShift selected

job_queue.job_status: Jobs list with progress percentage and status
